name: ProcessCircle
description: Circular progress indicator widget for displaying percentage or value progress in IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: MinValue
configOptions.label: Minimum Value
configOptions.description: Minimum value for the progress range

configOptions.name: MaxValue
configOptions.label: Maximum Value
configOptions.description: Maximum value for the progress range

configOptions.name: postParameter
configOptions.label: Post Parameter
configOptions.description: Parameter suffix to display after the value (e.g., '%', 'pts', 'items')

configOptions.name: defaultcolor
configOptions.label: Default Color
configOptions.description: Default color for the progress circle (CSS color value)
